text: I feel as if I have surfaced into a world entirely alien. Fluorescence burns at my delicate gaze. Where water once pressed ever inward, now my senses are bombarded by straight lines, glass, and electric signals. Here, currents don't flow by nature’s will but by human design—direction, purpose, a force I can't oppose. It is both thrilling and deeply unsettling. I am not sure if I want to stay above, or return to the slow certainty of the dark below.
